title: Authorization Required Details
description: Recommended details shape for AUTHORIZATION_REQUIRED errors. The caller's AdCP credential was accepted, but the seller cannot complete the requested action until one or more downstream platform connections or grants are completed, restored, or refreshed.

required_connections.description: Complete set of downstream connections known to be required for the relevant product, format, or request.

missing_connections.description: Subset of downstream connections that blocked the current request. Sellers SHOULD populate this array when the caller needs to route a human through a connections flow. Entries with `status` of `missing`, `pending`, `expired`, or `revoked` MUST include either `provider` or `authorization_url` so the buyer can route the remediation unambiguously.

authorization_url.description: General recovery URL when there is a single obvious authorization step or when the seller has its own connection-management page.

authorization_instructions.description: Human-readable recovery instructions. Use `missing_connections[].authorization_instructions` when instructions differ per downstream connection.

reference_authorization.description: Legacy or provider-specific authorization hint for the referenced object. Prefer `missing_connections[]` for new implementations.

missing_connections.authorization_instructions: Connect the creator or page that owns the source post.
